meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [2.0.0] - 2024-05-21
### Changed
- connection update to @prefix ext-passport: <urn:samm:io.catenax.generic.digital_product_passport:5.0.0#>
- connection update to @prefix ext-pass: <urn:samm:io.catenax.transmission.transmission_pass:3.0.0#>
- changed payload name from unspecific to generic on highest level
- min and maxOilPressure are dynamic and will be changed to rated - structure changed below
- added connections to transmission_pass:3.0.0 in "power" and "torque" to have more similarities

## [1.0.0] - 2024-03-25
### Added
- initial model in SAMM 2.1.0

### Changed
n/a

### Removed
n/a

nodes.label: ElectricDrivePassport
nodes.description: The E-Drive Passport is a data record that summarizes the components, materials and chemical substances or information on repairability, spare parts or professional disposal for an E-Drive. The data comes from all phases of the product life cycle and can be used for various purposes in all these phases (design, production, use, disposal). Structuring environmental data in a standardized, comparable format enables all actors in the value and supply chain to work together towards a circular economy. This data model is based on the new proposed Ecodesign Regulation (ESPR-2022) and the product specific requirements collected from different manufacturers and users of the product.

nodes.label: productSpecificParameters
nodes.description: Product specific parameters of the electric drive.

nodes.label: productUnspecificParameters
nodes.description: The product unspecific parameters. These are defined by the Digital Product Passport proposal from the ESPR. The main basis is provided by the document "Proposal for a REGULATION OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL establishing a framework for setting ecodesign requirements for sustainable products and repealing Directive 2009/125/EC" from March 30th, 2022. The latest version of the document was the provisional agreement between the EU Council and the Parliament from January 9th, 2024.

nodes.label: generalInformation
nodes.description: General information to the eDrive system, including additional information in comparison to the identification category such as the service history and compatible vehicle types.

nodes.label: eMachine
nodes.description: Data of the e-Machine built into the eDrive, including information E-Machine model and technology (type), and the permanent magnet types / materials.

nodes.label: coolingAndLubricants
nodes.description: Information about the used lubricants and coolants, including liquid specifications and built-in technical lubricant systems.

nodes.label: inverter
nodes.description: Inverter related data, that could be used in case of replacing or updating an inverter.

nodes.label: systemAndPerformance
nodes.description: System and Performance information of the entire eDrive system.

nodes.label: transmission
nodes.description: Information about the transmission built into the eDrive, including technical data.

nodes.label: electricDriveDocuments
nodes.description: Documents pertaining to the removal, replacement, disassembly or dismantling of the entire eDrive.

nodes.label: compatibleVehicleTypes
nodes.description: The vehicle types, in which the eDrive of this passport can be used. Possible selections are "battery-electric vehicle", "hybrid-electric vehicle", "fuel-cell-electric vehicle".

nodes.label: service
nodes.description: The eDrive service history.

nodes.label: eMachineId
nodes.description: The unique serial ID of the e-Machine built into the eDrive of this passport; defined and provided by the owner/economic operator of the passport.

nodes.label: permanentMagnetType
nodes.description:
The permanent magnet type describes the material composition of the permanent magnet in use. In case of SSM e-Motors, no permanent magnets are used, requiring the input of a default value. Possible selections:
- No permanent magnets used (SSM motor): "None"
- AlNiCo: "Aluminum-Nickel-Cobalt"
- Ceramic: "Ceramic"
- Ferrite: "Ferrite"
- Flexible: "Flexible Rubber"
- SmCo: "Samarium Cobalt"
- NdFeB: "Neodymium Iron Boron"

nodes.label: ratedSpeed
nodes.description: Rated speed determined by the electronics and measured in RPM, limited through software or physical limits (e.g. maximum power).

nodes.label: statorDiameter
nodes.description: Diameter of the E-Machine stator, measured in millimetres.

nodes.label: eMachineTechnology
nodes.description: The type of the e-machine built into the eDrive. Possible values are "ASM" (Asynchronous motor), "PSM" (Permanently excited synchronous motor) and "ESM" (Electrically-excited synchronous motor). This should not  be confused with an electrical machine integrated in a transmission.

nodes.label: eMachineWeight
nodes.description: Net weight, component weight without packaging, of the electrical machine, which is built into the eDrive.

nodes.label: coolingTopology
nodes.description: General cooling topology, which can be either one of the types: "air-cooled", "water-cooled" or "oil-cooled".

nodes.label: oilCapacityEdrive
nodes.description: The defined oil volume in the eDrive, measured in cubic decimetres. In case of a combined oil circuit for both the eDrive and the built-in transmission, the value must be identical to the oil capacity value of the transmission.

nodes.label: oilTypeEdrive
nodes.description: The type of the oil for the eDrive defined by the manufacturer. In case of a combined oil circuit for both the eDrive and the built-in transmission, the value must be identical to the oil type value of the transmission.

nodes.label: minimumOilPressure
nodes.description: Minimum oil pressure to date during the usage of the eDrive, as measured through the oil pump, measured in bar.

nodes.label: maximumOilPressure
nodes.description: Maximum oil pressure to date during the usage of the eDrive, as measured through the oil pump, measured in bar.

nodes.label: oilModule
nodes.description: Flag indicating the availability or absence of an oil module. An oil module is an umbrella term for devices that are manipulating the oil flow and the temperature in the product and incorporate cooler, pump, valves (pressure regulation valve).

nodes.label: maximumOilTemperature
nodes.description: The maximum oil temperature to safely operate the eDrive, measured in celsius on the oil temperature sensor. Please note the oil temperature can vary in other positions within the lubrication circuit.

nodes.label: inverterCurrent
nodes.description: Electric current flowing through the inverter, measured in ampere.

nodes.label: maximumPhaseCurrent
nodes.description: The maximum allowable current to pass through the phases, measured in ampere.

nodes.label: softwareVersion
nodes.description: Indicates the software version of the inverter.

nodes.label: systemVoltage
nodes.description: The characterizing voltage level in the vehicle in volts, to which the battery and electric drive are adjusted to.

nodes.label: power
nodes.description: Technical power figures in kilowatt.

nodes.label: torque
nodes.description: Technical torque figures.

nodes.label: gearRatio
nodes.description: Gear ratio calculated by dividing the angular or rotational speed of the output shaft by the angular speed of the input shaft. It can also be calculated by dividing the total driving gear’s teeth by the total driven gear’s teeth.

nodes.label: transmissionId
nodes.description: Transmission ID of the transmission i.e. serial number allowing for unequivocal identification of the transmission.

nodes.label: gearboxStructure
nodes.description: Short description of the gearbox design, e.g. layshaft or planetary, depending on the technical design of the car.

nodes.label: technicalDismantlingInstructions
nodes.description: Document containing information and instructions, including steps, diagrams and illustrations of removing or replacing the eDrive or dismantling it.

nodes.label: requiredToolsForDismantling
nodes.description: Document containing information and instructions for required tools or technologies pertaining to the removal, replacement or dismantling of the eDrive.

nodes.label: serviceHistory
nodes.description: The dates of putting the eDrive into service.

nodes.label: lastServiceDate
nodes.description: The date of the last service.

nodes.label: oilTimeStamp
nodes.description: Measuring timestamp, when the oil pressure during the usage of the eDrive was measured last.

nodes.label: oilValue
nodes.description: Oil pressure to date during the usage of the eDrive, as measured through the oil pump, measured in bar.

nodes.label: maximumPower
nodes.description: The maximum output power in kilowatts for a specified time period.

nodes.label: continuousPower
nodes.description: The output power in kilowatts that can be delivered continuously.

nodes.label: continuousRegeneratedPower
nodes.description: The amount of power, which can be regenerated continuously, within the bounds of normal operation, in kilowatts.

nodes.label: maximumRegeneratedPower
nodes.description: The maximum possible value that can be regenerated at a given time in kilowatts.

nodes.label: maximumTorque
nodes.description: The maximum torque the system delivers over a specific measurement time period.

nodes.label: continuousTorque
nodes.description: The torque that can theoretically be delivered constantly without a time limit.

nodes.label: maximumAxleTorque
nodes.description: Maximum motor torque multiplied by the gear ratio.

nodes.label: maxValue
nodes.description: The maximum value in kilowatts for a specified time period.

nodes.label: maxPeriod
nodes.description: Specified time period measurement in seconds.

nodes.label: maxPowerECER85
nodes.description: Maximum power in kilowatts, measured according to the ECER85 regulatory requirements.

nodes.label: torqueValue
nodes.description: Measured torque value in newton metre.

nodes.label: SpecificCharacteristic
nodes.description: The Characteristic to describe product specific parameters of the electric drive.

nodes.label: UnspecificCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for the product unspecific parameters.

nodes.label: GeneralCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for general information.

nodes.label: EMachineCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for e-machine values.

nodes.description: Entity for cooling and lubricants.

nodes.label: InverterCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for inverter values.

nodes.label: SystemCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for performance and system values.

nodes.label: TransmissionCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for transmission values.

nodes.label: ElectricDriveDocumentsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for specific documents of the electric drive.

nodes.label: ServiceCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for the service dates.

nodes.label: IdentifierCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for identifiers of components in the electrical drive.

nodes.label: OilPressureCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for oil pressure values.

nodes.label: PowerCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for power values.

nodes.label: TorqueCharacteristic
nodes.description: Entity for torque values.

nodes.label: DateCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for values in the data type date.

nodes.label: MaximumPowerCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic with maximum power values.

nodes.label: MaximumRegeneratedPowerCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for maximum regenerated power values.

nodes.label: MaximumTorqueCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for maximum torque values.

nodes.description: The Entity for product specific parameters of the electric drive.

nodes.label: UnspecificEntity
nodes.description: Entity for the product unspecific parameters.

nodes.label: GeneralEntity

nodes.description: Entity for inverter values.

nodes.description: Entity for performance and system values.

nodes.label: ElectricDriveDocumentsEntity
nodes.description: Entity for specific documents of the electric drive.

nodes.label: ServiceEntity
nodes.description: Entity for the service dates.

nodes.label: OilPressureEntity
nodes.description: Entity for oil pressure values.

nodes.label: PowerEntity
nodes.description: Entity for power values.

nodes.label: TorqueEntity

nodes.label: MaximumPowerEntity

nodes.label: MaximumRegeneratedPowerEntity

nodes.label: MaximumTorqueEntity

nodes.label: CompatibleVehicleTypesTrait
nodes.description: Trait to restrict values.

nodes.label: RevolutionsMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement of revolutions per minute as float value.

nodes.label: MillimetreMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement of millimetre as float value.

nodes.label: CubicDecimetreMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement of cubic decimetre as float value.

nodes.label: CelsiusMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement in celsius as float value.

nodes.label: AmpereMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement of ampere as float value.

nodes.label: VoltMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement in volt as float value.

nodes.label: BarMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement of the pressure in bar as float value.

nodes.label: KilowattMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement in kilowatt as float value.

nodes.label: NewtonMetreMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement in newton metre as decimal value.

nodes.label: SecondsMeasurement
nodes.description: Measurement in seconds as integer value.

nodes.label: TechnologyEnumeration
nodes.description: Enumeration for the e-machine technology.

nodes.label: CoolingEnumeration
nodes.description: Enumeration of cooling technology.

nodes.label: StringList
nodes.description: A list of values in the data type string.

nodes.label: DateList
nodes.description: A list of values in the data type date.

nodes.label: VehicleTypesConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for the three possible vehicle types. A selection of multiple is possible.
